operation.search:
$_['text_agree'] = 'Я прочитал %s и согласен с
условиями безопасности и обработки персональных данных';
operation.add:
$_['text_agree'] = 'Я прочитал %3$s и согласен с
условиями безопасности и обработки персональных данных ';
$_['error_email'] = 'E-mail адрес введен неверно!'; $_['error_blank_email'] = 'E-mail адрес не может быть пустым!';

operation.search: $_['error_enquiry'] = 'Длина текста должна быть от 10 до 3000 символов!';
operation.add: $_['error_enquiry'] = 'Длина текста должна быть от 10 до 3000 символов!';

operation.search: {{ error_warning }}
operation.add: {{ ' ' ~ error_warning }}

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />

operation.search: {{ error_warning }}
operation.add: {{ ' ' ~ error_warning }}

<script>
		const setRedirectionToButton = (buttonId) => {
			const button = document.getElementById(buttonId);
			const buttonRedirectionLink = button.dataset.href;
			button.addEventListener('click', () =>
				window.location.href = buttonRedirectionLink
			);
		}

		setRedirectionToButton('register-button');
		setRedirectionToButton('login-button');
	</script>

operation.search:
{% if logged %}
  • {{ text_account }}
  • {{ text_order }}
  • {{ text_transaction }}
  • {{ text_download }}
  • {{ text_logout }}
    • {% else %}
  • {{ text_register }}
  • {{ text_login }}
    • {% endif %}
operation.add:
{% if logged %}
  • {{ text_account }}
  • {{ text_order }}
  • {{ text_transaction }}
  • {{ text_download }}
  • {{ text_logout }}
{% else %} {% endif %}

operation.search: • {{ text_homepage }}
operation.add: • {{ text_homepage }}

operation.search: • {{ text_documentation }}
• {{ text_support }}
operation.add: • {{ text_support }}

operation.search: <input type="text" name="model" value="{{ model }}" placeholder="{{ entry_model }}" id="input-model" class="form-control"/>
operation.add: <div class="col-sm-9"> <input type="text" name="model" value="{{ model }}" placeholder="{{ entry_model }}" id="input-model" class="form-control"/>

2. {% if dirs %} {% for dir in dirs %}
  2. {{ dir }}
    3. {% endfor %} {% endif %}

operation.search: {% if license.value == filter_license %}{{ license.text }}{% else %}{{ license.text }}{% endif %}
<input type="text" name="name" value="{{ name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="text" name="name" value="{{ name }}" placeholder="{{ entry_name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
<textarea name="enquiry" rows="10" id="input-enquiry" placeholder="{{ entry_enquiry }}" class="form-control">{{ enquiry }}</textarea>
